$comment: Layer B selection cases for TRANSFER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The duplicated BAL leaves force OF/IN qualification; a candidate that reads the wrong record's balance credits approved transfers onto 1000.00 instead of 250.00 (DST_BAL off by 750.00), caught on every approved case. Cases cover a typical approval, the exact decline boundary (987.65 -> net 1000.00 approved vs 987.66 declined), a half-cent ROUNDED fee, a deep decline, and a zero transfer.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TRANSFER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-transfer)
